title: Creamy Bean Italian-Style Stir Fry
description: A twist on traditional stir frys, adding Italian flavors and creamy texture with gooey mozzarella cheese.

ingredients.name: long
ingredients.notes: Italian long-stemmed zucchini or green beans

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
Add the garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
Add the beans and long-stemmed zucchini, and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add the soy sauce substitute and stir-fry for another minute.
Transfer the bean mixture to a serving dish and top with mozzarella cheese.
Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for 5-7 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Serve hot, garnished with lemon wedges.
